mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LOGIN_LOG (LOG_ID, USER_ID, LOGIN_IP, LOGIN_DT, SESSION_ID) VALUES (LOGIN_LOG_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{loginIp}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{sessionId})
mapper.update: UPDATE LOGIN_LOG SET LOGOUT_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE SESSION_ID = #{sessionId} AND LOGOUT_DT IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT LOG_ID, USER_ID, LOGIN_IP, LOGIN_DT, LOGOUT_DT, SESSION_ID FROM LOGIN_LOG WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY LOGIN_DT DESC

SELECT l.LOG_ID, l.USER_ID, l.LOGIN_IP, l.LOGIN_DT, l.LOGOUT_DT, l.SESSION_ID FROM LOGIN_LOG l INNER JOIN ( SELECT USER_ID, MAX(LOGIN_DT) AS MAX_LOGIN_DT FROM LOGIN_LOG GROUP BY USER_ID ) latest ON l.USER_ID = latest.USER_ID AND l.LOGIN_DT = latest.MAX_LOGIN_DT
